action_write_enabled.name: action_write_enabled
action_write_enabled.description:
Enables the ability to create and modify actions within Flow Designer when paired with the action_designer or admin role. 

This role is required to grant write access to actions; without it, users cannot edit or create actions, even if they hold action_designer or admin. 

By default, action_write_enabled is included in the action_designer and admin roles to preserve existing functionality. To restrict write access for specific users, remove this role while retaining their base privileges. 

Assign action_write_enabled alongside action_designer or admin to explicitly enable action-writing capabilities for selected users.

flow_write_enabled.name: flow_write_enabled
flow_write_enabled.description:
Enables the ability to create and modify flows within Flow Designer when paired with the flow_designer or admin role. This role is required to grant write access to flows; without it, users cannot edit or create flows, even if they hold flow_designer or admin. 

By default, flow_write_enabled is included in the flow_designer and admin roles to maintain existing functionality. 

To restrict write access for specific users, remove this role while retaining their base privileges. 

Assign flow_write_enabled alongside flow_designer or admin to explicitly enable flow-writing capabilities for selected users.
